DM® Essentials 4K60 4:4:4 Receiver and 2x2 Auto-Switcher for HDMI® and USB 2.0 Signal Extension over CATx Cable. Interoperability with a DM® Essentials HD-TXU-4KZ Series transmitter to provide point-to-point extension of HDMI® and USB 2.0 signals over a CATx cable. Supports 4K60 4:4:4 video, HDR10+, and HDCP 2.3. Provides one HDMI input and one DM Lite input with automatic switching capability and support of two HDMI outputs.

Interoperability with a DM Essentials HD-TXU-4KZ Series transmitter to provide point-to-point extension of HDMI, USB 2.0, and Ethernet signals over a CATx cable. Supports 4k60 4:4:4 video, HDR10+, and HDCP 2.3.
